cautious_finding: The official UFSN PDF adds one exact-row document-grade public-sector companion for the Danish SU handicaptillæg AI screening row by stating that UFS was exploring whether artificial intelligence could support case handling, had entered into cooperation with a supplier to explore automated screening of incoming applications, and was awaiting a guiding opinion from Datatilsynet before further development could proceed.
threshold_state_change: improves Denmark from governance-plus-legal-basis-only sidecar to governance-plus-official-planning-document sidecar; does not prove procurement award, deployment, DPIA completion, effectiveness, or legal clearance
next_safe_move: Prefer one later official operational, DPIA, evaluation, procurement, or implementation surface for the same SU AI screening row rather than another legal-basis restatement.
